reviews.review_description: I'm a Evil Dead fan and when I found this I had alot of hope for it. The game is alot of fun, but I think that it could use some small touches to it. For one, and I don't know if it's just me but, it would be nice to have a crosshair to in least have a idea where your aiming with the fire arms. Especially with the boss fight. 2nd, there should be more than just two different maps to play on. In least have 3 or 4 to play on, when you've done the same two maps over and over it gets a little boring. Add a little spice to the game and introduce more than just two different monsters and have different bosses. And maybe add a little more ammo for the shotgun. Or have it to where you can stack up on ammo. Otherwise than that this is a fun game. The look and feel of it are great, and it is so satisfying to get that nice one shot kill on a deadight. Looking forward to playing the game more. But if the developers see this please consider some of these ideas and make this a awesome and fantastic game to play!
Fun, although i wish i could find a way to make it so you could aim weapons with the controller
I really like the cabin experience. I am very happy you added the choice to go back to it.
Good idea but the game is too repetitive. Graphics could be better and price should be lower.

developer_response.body:
Sorry our game didn't completely meet your expectations, which many of our players have found engaging and fun! Being an endless runner then variety comes by the missions, with a new rewarded weapon every time, and on completion of a Boss level a new set of variables to the forest to add diversity and increasing difficulty to game play. We have 2 different forests to run through whilst the missions and variables change around you as gameplay progress so variety has been considered in the design of the title.
All comments will be considered whist planning our next update so thank you for the feedback.

reviews.review_description: I actually can’t believe that I payed full price for this game. The first part of the game inside the house is the only scary part and lasts about a minute then you can never replay it. then every mission after is “how far can you make it running thru this field” and you have to be super precise when clicking the trigger to attack. Just all out the lamest game I’ve played on my oculus go and it sucks that the only reason this is selling is because they took a big name like “evil dead” and slapped it on it.

developer_response.body:
Sorry our game didn't meet your expectations. We have included the iconic forest as well as an interpretation of the Abomination within the forest in the main game to link with the Evil Dead brand, along with weapons and upgrades to them which all are from the film and used to gory effect! Being an endless runner then variety comes by the missions, with a new rewarded weapon every time, and on completion of a Boss level a new set of variables to the forest to add diversity and increasing difficulty to game play. 
We're happy you enjoyed the opening scene, and I'm pleased to tell you can reply it from the start menu by selecting 'Cabin Experience'.

reviews.review_description: After 3 years of happily playing this game, it stopped! Now the game isn't working anymore! please help, I purchased this game!

The atmosphere is great and the intro leading up to the cabin with the fast camera is perfect. I love the main hub where you can see the girl in the basement all crazy and demonic, well done. Also unlike a similar endless runner “Into the Dead”, you can run over almost any terrain which I really love. 

Here are a few things that I would ask the developer to consider when updating the game in a future patch. 

The death sequence should maybe have a few other variables with different quotes and slightly different animations although I do like the one death scene animation.

The only other thing that would maybe give it a little more visual variety is having a couple different zombie types even in the beginning. They can just be pallet swaps but it would add a little bit of variety. Also maybe a slight variance to the boss battle with every stage may be cool.

I think all in all it’s worth a buy just to try to achieve the challenges and also to use the iconic weapons alone.

“Hail to the King baby.”
Great game love ot graphics are very good can't get enough of killing zombies

In the imortal words of Ash "Groovy"
Fast paced action loads of great content and refrences to the film.
But a little repetive
Although I have only just started playing,  I am really enjoying it. The game has a creepy and immersive feel to it. Would recommend.
I love the game but once in a while the cat stays on the hand, stops warding off and prevenrs picking up the rabbits foot or F-bombs for the entire run.
Such a great game!, I love it. Outstanding graphics and sound, controls are simple and I can play this for hours. Is even better once you get the better weapons.

Finally a cool game. Been seeing way too many foo foo titles lately.This is so much fun and simply iconic.Only thing i wish is I could go back to first part. I like jump scares of course and that first part startled me good! Also, would love to see some more ammo capacity. Maybe a horde mode or somehting. Nice work everyone!
Took awhile to download....and it said it couldn't instsll....but when I put the goggles  on it was there....fixing to play first gsme..

Ok so i do not like runners at all i honestly thought i would buy it just because i love evil dead see the cool stuff at beginning make a run keep my play time well under 30 min and refund it but its actually super fun its the missions that make it fun collecting weapons and upgrading them its a blast and i was 100% sure it wasnt for me very glad i was wrong a leaderboards would sure be amazing though or even strictly optional paid DLC with new environments/weaps/enemys that type of stuff and yes since its not free to develope charge a small but fair price we ED fans are crazy enuff to buy it if your fair lol

The game it self isn't that bad. We're close to get something fun. But far enough not to be fun. The controls are ok when running. Aiming with your face is bad though. You have a controler why can't you use it..?

The boss fight is horrible. Or I haven't understood the mechanics yet. Should be a tutorial on how to play it since it doesn't seem to play like the running game.

Hope we will see an update soon.
I will update my review with the next update.

reviews.review_title: Epic! Play it! Or We'll Eat Your SOUL!
reviews.review_description:
Evil dead fan? If you liked the new movie, play this. It's basically an endless runner, but it is challenging, has a real Evil Dead feel, and is Hella Fun. 
P.S. Love to keep chatting, but, you know, Deadites to kill... Time to Suck A Little Saw! *Starts chainsaw* :)

reviews.review_title: Great game for a evil dead fan
reviews.review_description:
I’ve given it four stars because I expected more like some stages to complete maybe some looking around more
However it is official evil dead I’m a big fan so it’s good to have in my collection 
I would recommend it definitely as there’s no game like it
Pretty cool game.  If you dig The Evil Dead, you'll dig this game.  The music is awesome too.
